title.en: Chanukah: Beyond the Dreidel — The Real Story and Its Lessons
title.zh: 光明节:超越陀螺游戏——真实的故事与教训
title.he: חנוכה: מעבר לסביבון — הסיפור האמיתי והלקחים שלו

description: The historical and spiritual significance of Chanukah, the miracle of the oil, and detailed menorah-lighting instructions.
chinese_historical_context: Maccabean Revolt (167-160 BCE) during China's Western Han Dynasty (西汉, 206 BCE - 9 CE)
notes: Successfully completed all three language versions with comprehensive historical context, practical instructions, spiritual lessons, and Chinese cultural parallels. All bibliography URLs verified via Scrapling.
